experiences.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Reduced API latency by 30% across critical endpoints by optimizing 180+ PostgreSQL queries and implementing strategic indexing, significantly improving platform responsiveness for 500+ employer clients.
Engineered core features for a proprietary benefits administration platform supporting 500+ employer clients, facilitating seamless data exchange between HR systems and insurance carriers.
Designed and implemented encryption-at-rest and in-transit controls across databases storing sensitive employee benefit (PHI) data, ensuring continuous adherence to HIPAA and state privacy mandates.

Manually audited and refactored core legacy applications, implemented robust input validation, and replaced 40+ vulnerable queries with Prepared Statements to eliminate high-risk SQL Injection and Cross-Site Scripting flaws.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Architected and developed the proprietary backend framework from scratch, enforcing clean architecture and standardized components across mission-critical services, which reduced critical production incidents by 40%.
Built automated CI/CD pipelines using Git, Docker, and Jenkins for backend service deployment on AWS, achieving a 100% deployment success rate with zero downtime.
Implemented robust data masking and encryption schemes (AES-256) for salary, tax, and employee PII stored in the high-volume transactional database layer, protecting critical financial information.

Implemented modern, secure login flows utilizing OAuth 2.0 authorization protocols and JSON Web Tokens for session management, enforcing Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) and strong password policies across all administrative and customer portals.
